creator: shattered@users.sourceforge.net
text:
For some reason net-snmp still does memory grovelling to get data for ssCpuRawInterrupt; it has no relation to data reported by 'sysctl vm.stats.sys.v_intr'.

How-To-Repeat: Run "snmpget ... UCD-SNMP-MIB::ssCpuRawInterrupt.0" several times, watch the value.  It changes, but much too slowly and may also decrease.
